title: The Explosion Leaves the City Waiting
description: On pages 17–19, this part focuses on the explosion leaves the city waiting, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Explosion Leaves the City Waiting. Pell carries Alabasta’s hope into the air as the bomb plot reaches its most sacrificial moment. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: in the short span of this fight...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Alubarma North Block, Fight along the Main Road of the Medi Diet Hall

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Pant... Pant... Dammit... I lost too much blood...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's a blessing that the cuts aren't too deep but... Damn, does it ever hurt...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I wonder how the rest are doing...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Did Nami Manage to run away alright?

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: No one died, right...? Damn, I wish I could find out...

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: What!? I have to team up with eye- lashes!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Uhh, hellooo! He's a freakin' C-A-M-E-L!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Are you guys making light of how weak I really am!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We drew lots and them's the breaks, buddy.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: AL RIGHT, FINE! But promise me one thing! If we're in major danger, your ass better come to save ours! Please!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What the hell are you cryin' for?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'm not crying! In fact, people who accuse others of crying are usually the ones crying!

summary: This part develops the explosion leaves the city waiting and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
